name: Valero Energy Corporation
description: Valero Energy Corporation is a prominent American multinational energy company and the world's largest independent petroleum refiner. Headquartered in San Antonio, Texas, the company specializes in the manufacturing and marketing of transportation fuels, including gasoline, diesel, and jet fuel, as well as other petrochemical products. Valero is also recognized as a leading producer of renewable fuels in North America, operating a diverse portfolio of refineries and ethanol plants. Through its extensive infrastructure and commitment to operational excellence, Valero plays a critical role in the global energy supply chain while advancing sustainable energy solutions.
